changes: Condensed verbose skill (236 lines) to focused reference (75 lines) targeting the two task patterns
Removed sections not needed for tasks: error handling, shared state, loop-to-map, performance tuning, output ordering table
Added complete working examples for both word frequency (Counter merging) and SHA-256 checksum patterns
Emphasized sorted(glob.glob(...)) for deterministic file discovery
Added explicit rules section with 5 key guidelines
notes: parallel-checksum max achievable score is 93/100 due to test framework issue: toHaveProperty('data_00.bin') treats dot as nested path separator in Bun/Jest, causing 'all 30 expected filenames are present in output' test to always fail. This is independent of skill content.
